title: The Primary Dental Services Statement of Financial Entitlements (Amendment) Directions 2025
body: "The changes implemented in these directions relate to:    implementation of the 2024 to 2025 pay and expenses settlement for dentists   implementation of the 2024 to 2025 dental foundation training payments for dentists   insertion of the applicable up-to-date maternity allowance rate   implementation of the 2024 to 2025 New Patient Premium scheme payments for dentists   "
